haunts.name: The Mummy's Walk
haunts.traitor: Revealed by the Omen: The Sarcophagus
haunts.goal_heroes: Exterminate the Mummy by finding the Canopic Jars.
haunts.goal_traitor: Kill all explorers or complete the ritual in the Crypt.
haunts.special_rules: The Mummy moves 2 spaces and ignores speed limits.

haunts.name: The Séance
haunts.goal_heroes: Exorcise the ghost using the Spirit Board in the Séance Room.
haunts.goal_traitor: Possess three explorers before the clock strikes midnight.
haunts.special_rules: Knowledge rolls are required to resist possession.
